name: Norient Acquisition
business: We are a blank check company incorporated on March 23, 2026 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination (12 months from closing of offering, with possible 3-month extension)
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 12 months from the closing of this offering (or 15 months from the closing of this offering if our sponsor exercises its three-month extension option), as may be extended by shareholder approval to amend our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association to extend the date by which we must consummate our initial business combination, or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.
